column1: ## Phase A — JNI bridge per-call cost
## Method: nativeRoundTripLoop reuses staging buffer once, calls Java foldConcatBlob N=500k times
## Phase A gate: per-call cost <= 2000 ns. Measured: max 467 ns (4.3x under gate).
## Stress test (1M iterations, 64B input): nativeRoundTripLoop returns total bytes.
## Pass criterion: 1M iterations complete with no JVM crash and totalBytes == iterations * valueSize.
## Exception-handling probe: callback throws on empty input.
## Pass criterion: native code clears the exception and returns -2; no JVM crash.
